title: "The spring breeze brings warmth, and we fight the epidemic together" Tianhui Group cares about rural epidemic prevention testing points and donates charity materials
contentHtml:
"The spring breeze brings warmth, and we fight the epidemic together" Tianhui Group cares about rural epidemic prevention testing points and donates charity materials

On February 17, Wang Zhenguo, Director of the Logistics Department of Tianhui Group, came to the Beizhangzhuang Epidemic Prevention and Testing Point in Haigang Town, Qinhuangdao City early in the morning, and donated 200 kilograms of apples to rural epidemic prevention volunteers on behalf of Tianhui Group.Since the outbreak of the epidemic, volunteers at rural epidemic prevention monitoring points have taken on the responsibility day and night to ensure the safety of the people. Qinhuangdao Tianhui Plastic Co., Ltd. immediately thought of the simple and kind-hearted volunteers. No matter the cold wind or snow, they resolutely stick to their posts.For this donation event, we specially purchased sweet Luochuan apples to express the sincerity of Tianhui people and express our gratitude to the volunteers for their efforts.

Plant a seed and reap a life. A blessing can change a life, and a donation can warm a heart.
titleZh: “春风送暖，共战疫情”天晖集团关心农村防疫检测点捐献爱心物资
contentHtmlZh:
“春风送暖，共战疫情”天晖集团关心农村防疫检测点捐献爱心物资

2月17日，天晖集团后勤部部长王振国一早来到秦皇岛市海港镇北张庄防疫检测点，代表天晖集团为农村防疫志愿者捐献苹果200斤。疫情发生以来，农村防疫监测点的志愿者们为保证群众安危，勇于担当，夜以继日的承担起农村防疫检测的重任。秦皇岛市天晖塑料有限公司第一时间想到质朴善良的志愿者们，无论寒风还是风雪，他们毅然坚守在自己的岗位。此次捐赠活动，特采购甘甜的洛川苹果，表达天晖人的一份心意，并对志愿者们的付出表示感谢。

种下一粒种子，收获一片生机。一份祝福可以改变人生，一份捐赠可以温暖人心。
